title: Pressure eased, Rory co-leads in Masters defense
content: Rory McIlroy did not, by his standards, play his best golf in the opening round yet still managed a 5-under 67, good for a share of the early lead with Sam Burns and his lowest opening round at the Masters since 2011.

title: Sources: DOJ opens probe of NFL over TV deals
content: The Justice Department has begun an investigation into whether the NFL has violated anticompetitive practices with their television contracts that require consumers to pay subscription costs to watch some games, sources confirmed to ABC News.

title: Sixers' Embiid undergoes surgery for appendicitis
content: Philadelphia star center Joel Embiid has been diagnosed with appendicitis and is undergoing surgery Thursday in Houston. It's unclear when he'll be able to return.

title: Sources: Aces agree to $1.19M deal with Young
content: The Aces are finalizing an agreement for four-time All-Star guard Jackie Young to return to Las Vegas, sources told ESPN on Thursday.

title: Michigan lands coveted Vols transfer Estrella
content: Tennessee's J.P. Estrella, a 6-foot-11 redshirt sophomore transfer, told ESPN he committed to Michigan, giving the Wolverines their first portal player since winning the national title Monday.

title: Hidalgo returning to Notre Dame for senior year
content: Notre Dame guard Hannah Hidalgo, who was the Naismith and WBCA Defensive Player of the Year this season in women's basketball, will return to the Fighting Irish for her senior season.

title: Source: Cincinnati looking into move for Neymar
content: Neymar has emerged as the latest global soccer icon to draw interest from MLS, as FC Cincinnati started exploring options to bring the Santos star to the United States, a source told ESPN's Nathalia Ferrão.

title: Minnesota Viking: Wild ink D with fitting name
content: The Wild signed a defenseman named Viking Gustafsson Nyberg, a former UConn standout who signed a two-year, entry-level contract that begins with the current season.

title: Masters 2026: Rory's defense, most disappointing first rounds and looking ahead to the rest of the tournament
content: How will a loaded leaderboard take shape? Will the course continue to get more difficult? We look at round one and what could come next at Augusta National.

title: MLB Power Rankings: Brewers, Pirates rise as Red Sox fall in Week 2
content: Teams with championship hopes are falling down our list while a number of surprising starts have boosted the status of other unexpected contenders in Week 2.

title: The latest NFL draft intel for all 32 teams: What we're hearing on how the picks could play out
content: Our NFL reporters answer questions for every team two weeks out from the draft, and our analysts weigh in with some new intel on picks and moves.

title: Our draft experts picked 10-man rosters from the 2026 class: Who has the best superteam?
content: Mel Kiper Jr., Matt Miller, Jordan Reid and Field Yates drafted rosters of 2026 prospects. See their selections.

title: Hage, Verhoeff, Pohlkamp, more: Top NHL prospects playing in the Frozen Four
content: Scouting eyes from across the league will be fixed on the action in Las Vegas this weekend. Here are the top players to watch.

title: 'When you look good, you play good': Inside MLB's 2026 City Connect uniforms -- and what's next
content: For the first time, baseball released a full season of City Connects on the same day. Here's how they came to be and what the players think.

title: Grading MLB's City Connect uniforms: Eight new designs ...
content: From the latest looks to the designs of years past, we break down all of MLB's City Connect uniforms.

title: NC State men recount trainer's alleged sexual abuse
content: Lawsuit plaintiffs said they sought help but were subjected to unwanted genital touching or other misconduct.

title: '50 wins in a gap year': How Jaylen Brown turbocharged the Celtics back to title contention
content: Between memorizing the astrological signs of his teammates and undergoing extreme underwater training, Brown didn't need to be a hero in Boston. He simply needed to lead. "I'm not going to make myself small ever again."

title: NHL playoff watch: Clinching scenarios on 14-game Thursday
content: The playoff picture is coming into focus day by day. Here's the latest snapshot, plus projections for every team.

title: What the Raiders can learn from last time they paired a first-time head coach with a No. 1 overall pick QB
content: The Raiders last paired a new coach with a rookie QB in 2007. Will it be different with Klint Kubiak and Fernando Mendoza?

title: From Cyndi Lauper to 'The Man': The evolution of women's wrestling at WrestleMania
content: Dive into how women's professional wrestling has evolved on WWE's biggest stage over the past 40 years.

title: WNBA free agency and trade tracker: Latest deals and news
content: WNBA free agency is here. Jackie Young is returning to Las Vegas. Follow all the news, including key trades around the league.

title: Free agency: Predictions, biggest questions, more
content: Who are the biggest names who might be on the move, and how will the condensed offseason impact free agency?

title: Baldwin best catcher? Alcantara is back? Cam Smith a top-50 bat? Don't be surprised
content: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

title: Scottie Scheffler brings different vibes to Augusta than other star golfers
content: Scheffler might not generate the same buzz as players like Tiger and Phil, but he's a different kind of superstar, and maybe that's a good thing.

title: Why the UFL plans to expand in 2028 and believes Oklahoma City is a great fit
content: UFL co-owner Mike Repole promised expansion; the other city to join with OKC for 2028 is still to be determined.

title: UFC 327 expert picks: How can Procházka reclaim the light heavyweight title?
content: Can Carlos Ulberg upset Jiří Procházka? Three MMA experts pick Saturday's UFC light heavyweight title fight.

title: Drones, hype videos and data: The number crunchers behind the USMNT's World Cup prep
content: Players decide games and coaches help to guide them, but U.S. Soccer has a team of number crunchers sifting through reams of data to give them an edge.

title: Maguire's remarkable Man United turnaround: 'It's made me stronger'
content: Fresh from signing a new deal at Manchester United, Harry Maguire opens up on some of the tougher times of his career at Old Trafford.

title: Dickie V's Dazzling Dozen: Players, performances, coaches that defined the season
content: Dick Vitale hands out superlatives for a season that had everything, from Diaper Dandies to Prime-Time Performers.

title: 97-year-old 1947 refugee, presiding officer in 12 polls, struck off voter rolls in Bengal
content: Bengal's electoral rolls are in disarray as long-time voters, including a 97-year-old Partition refugee and a retired teacher, find their names struck off. Families are battling bureaucratic hurdles and stress, with one man dying in a tribunal queue. The process has left many disenfranchised, sparking protests and accusations of political manipulation.

title: Fragile truce in place, India reaches out to Gulf nations
content: India is bolstering its engagement with the Gulf as a fragile ceasefire takes hold in West Asia. Union Minister S. Jaishankar is visiting the UAE to deepen strategic ties, while Minister Hardeep Singh Puri is in Qatar to secure vital energy supplies.

title: With just an hour to go, Congress pulls out of Baramati race
content: In a significant political maneuver, the Congress party withdrew its candidate from the Baramati bye-election just before the nomination deadline. This decision, influenced by appeals from the Pawar family and Mahayuti partners, ensures Sunetra Pawar faces no major opposition. The bypoll was necessitated by the tragic passing of Ajit Pawar.

title: 'Journey started even before I was born': Mukul after winning game for LSG
content: Mukul Choudhary emerged as LSG’s hero with a match-winning unbeaten 54 off 27 balls in a last-ball win over KKR. Reflecting on his journey, he said, "Our financial condition wasn’t strong," delaying his start in cricket. Staying calm under pressure, he added, "My plan was simple - I wanted to stay till the end." Known for his attacking style, he credited belief and patience, saying he always backed himself to finish the game.

title: Oracle layoffs that shocked employees with 6 am email start to appear in public filings
content: Software giant Oracle is reportedly laying off around 700 workers in California, with job cuts expected by June 1. This move is part of a larger wave of layoffs, potentially impacting thousands, as the company invests heavily in AI infrastructure.  Meanwhile, Oracle faces scrutiny over its H-1B visa filings, sparking debate about American job displacement.

title: 'They better stop now': Trump warns Iran over Strait of Hormuz tanker fees
content: President Donald Trump issued stern warnings to Iran regarding the Strait of Hormuz, accusing Tehran of hindering oil shipments. He also criticized The Wall Street Journal's reporting on his Iran policy, asserting his actions have prevented Iran from obtaining nuclear weapons and will soon restore oil flow. These statements follow a recent ceasefire agreement between Washington and Tehran.

title: Assembly elections: Kerala, Assam, Puducherry record higher turnout than 2021
content: Kerala, Puducherry, and Assam witnessed increased voter turnout in their recent assembly elections compared to 2021. Puducherry recorded the highest at 89.20%, followed by Assam at 85.10%, and Kerala at 77.50%. Senior leaders, including chief ministers, cast their votes across the 126 seats in Assam, 140 in Kerala, and 30 in Puducherry, with vote counting scheduled for May 4.

title: Putin announces truce with Ukraine during Orthodox Easter celebrations
content: Russian President Vladimir Putin has announced a temporary ceasefire with Ukraine for the Orthodox Easter holidays, effective from April 11th to April 12th, 2026. This move follows a similar holiday truce proposal from Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky. The Kremlin stated that Russian troops are instructed to cease combat operations but remain ready to counter any enemy provocations.

title: What Meta AI head Wang said to those calling Muse Spark AI model 'disappointment'
content: Meta's new AI model, Muse Spark, powering its AI assistant, has drawn criticism for prioritizing benchmarks over real-world utility.  While Meta acknowledges performance gaps, it highlights user satisfaction in areas like visual coding and reasoning.  This initial model, designed for speed and capability, is set to power Meta's platforms soon.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office collection Day 21: Ranveer Singh starrer dips under Rs 10 crore
content: Aditya Dhar's 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' continues its record-breaking spree, crossing Rs 1,000 crore net in India and achieving a worldwide gross of Rs 1,653.67 crore. Despite a slight dip on its 21st day, the film has secured a spot in the top 10 highest-grossing films globally for 2026, marking a significant international triumph for Indian cinema.

title: 'Epstein did not introduce me to Donald Trump': Melania Trump rejects connection
content: First Lady Melania Trump has issued a rare public statement, firmly denying any connection to Jeffrey Epstein and refuting claims that he introduced her to President Donald Trump. She stated she has no knowledge of Epstein's abuse and was never involved with him, nor did she visit his island or travel on his plane.

title: Assam, Puducherry record highest-ever voter turnouts
content: Record voter turnouts were recorded in Assam, Kerala, and Puducherry, with officials hailing it as a validation of electoral roll revisions and a sign of public trust. Assam and Puducherry achieved all-time highs, while Kerala saw its best turnout since 1987. Muslim-majority seats in Assam saw a significant surge in participation.

title: After failed record supermarket merger, Albertsons cuts jobs, says AI is helping operations
content: Grocery giant Albertsons is significantly cutting back its physical stores and workforce nationwide following the collapse of its proposed merger with Kroger. Facing intense competition, the company has already closed around 20 locations this year, with more slated for closure across various states. This restructuring aims to streamline operations and adapt to market pressures.

title: CWC meet over women's bill today
content: Congress Working Committee will convene Friday to deliberate on the women's reservation law amendments, following DMK chief M.K. Stalin's sharp critique. Concerns are raised that a "proportionate increase" in Lok Sabha seats could disadvantage southern and smaller states, benefiting northern ones. The timing of the BJP's proposal amid assembly elections also faces scrutiny.

title: Army contingent departs for Egypt for joint special forces exercise
content: An Indian Army special forces contingent has arrived in Egypt for the fourth edition of the joint exercise 'Cyclone-IV'. This collaboration, running from April 9-17, aims to bolster military ties and enhance joint mission planning.  Twenty-five Indian soldiers will train alongside Egyptian counterparts, focusing on special operational tactics in desert environments to improve interoperability and share best practices.

title: Govt plans design, development of unmanned combat search and rescue aircraft for IAF
content: The Indian Air Force is set to receive an indigenous unmanned combat search and rescue aircraft. This autonomous system will be capable of carrying 400 kg, including passengers and stretchers, and can deliver supplies to challenging terrains.

title: Serena Williams shares rare Easter photos, opens up on motherhood
content: Serena Williams shared rare Easter photos with Alexis Ohanian and daughters Olympia and Adira, calling family time everything. She also spoke on Today about motherhood, her daughters’ personalities, and learning to balance attention between them. Her words and photos showed a simple, honest side of life after tennis, focused fully on family and everyday moments.

title: Dianna Russini admits doubts about marriage amid Vrabel drama
content: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and The New York Times’ popular NFL reporter, Dianna Russini, have landed themselves in major trouble in the last few hours. After being spotted at an upscale hotel in Sedona, it is being rumored that Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini have had an alleged affair for a long time. While both of them have strongly denied affair rumors, Dianna Russini’s words about how she was unsure of marrying her husband have sparked chaos.

title: Megan Thee Stallion opens up on mother’s death amid Klay romance
content: The Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson, has proven his love and loyalty towards the popular Grammy winner, Megan Thee Stallion, for close to a year of their high profile romance. While Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson seem happy together, the popular artist had gone through a lot in her life, including witnessing her mother’s brutal death in 2019.

title: Chandrayaan-2 data reveals water buried on Moon for billions of years is stable: Study
content: A new international study reveals lunar water ice deposits in permanently shadowed regions are more stable than previously thought, with 74% of these areas unaffected by impacts. This finding is crucial for future manned lunar missions aiming to establish bases, as these regions offer promising targets for water ice exploration and utilization.

title: PSU BEL acquires land in UP’s Chitrakoot to manufacture ‘desi Iron Dome’ Kusha system
content: Bharat Electronics Limited is establishing a new manufacturing unit in Uttar Pradesh's defence corridor, investing over Rs 600 crore. This facility will produce next-generation missiles, radar systems, and India's own 'Iron Dome,' aiming to boost indigenous defence capabilities and reduce foreign dependency. The project is expected to create significant employment and foster industrial growth in the state.

title: Tiger Woods, Vanessa Trump relationship; Trump family may cut ties
content: Tiger Woods faces serious pressure after his DUI case, with expert Nick Kalm warning it could affect his relationship with Vanessa Trump. The Trump family may distance themselves if things worsen. Kalm says Woods must enter rehab, take full responsibility, and rebuild trust through real actions, not just words, to protect both his image and personal life.

title: Iran-US truce talks in Pakistan: Who is likely to attend?
content: A high-level US delegation, led by Vice President JD Vance, will travel to Islamabad this weekend for crucial talks with Iran. The discussions aim to secure a more lasting ceasefire and end weeks of intense hostilities. Pakistan will host the in-person meetings, with Prime Minister Muhammad Shehbaz Sharif expected to be involved. Both sides are set to hold direct negotiations.

title: Kangana reacts as RGV calls Dhurandhar 2 ‘stabbing my past’, shares birthday pic
content: Filmmaker Ram Gopal Varma celebrated his birthday with a star-studded party in Mumbai. He marked the occasion by cutting a cake featuring his iconic films and praised Aditya Dhar's 'Dhurandhar2' as a "surgical warfare on celluloid," calling Dhar his new 'guru' and a textbook for aspiring filmmakers.

title: IPL: Mukul snatches win from KKR’s clutches in last-ball thriller
content: Lucknow Super Giants beat Kolkata Knight Riders by three wickets in a last-ball thriller, chasing 182. KKR scored 181/4 with key knocks from Ajinkya Rahane and Angkrish Raghuvanshi. In reply, Ayush Badoni’s 54 and Mukul Choudhary’s unbeaten 54 sealed the win. Despite wickets from Anukul Roy and Vaibhav Arora, KKR couldn’t stop LSG in a tense finish.

title: Who is Mukul Choudhary? Meet youngster who turned the game for LSG
content: Chasing 182, LSG rode on Ayush Badoni's 34-ball 54 and Mukul Choudhary's brilliant 27-ball 54 not out to cross the line in a last ball thriller.

title: Horoscope: Daily astrological predictions for today
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for April 10, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: Schrodinger's ceasefire: Decoding the 'peace treaty' amid US-Israel war with Iran
content: The term Schrödinger’s XYZ has since slipped into the modern lexicon to describe any situation of uncertainty, and it certainly fits the description for the current imbroglio in the Middle East.

title: Coco Gauff hits back at Miu Miu hair criticism in video, turns backlash into bold message
content: Coco Gauff addressed criticism over her Miu Miu campaign in an 8-minute TikTok video, defending her natural hair and personal choices. She explained the shoot, spoke about hair care, and shared a strong message about self-acceptance. While handling the controversy, Gauff continues her strong 2026 season and now prepares for the clay courts ahead.

title: Trump tests Nato: US demands pledges to secure Hormuz as Iran chokes strait again
content: The cracks in Nato grew wider after the bloc gave a cold shoulder to the Washington when Trump sought the Cold War-era alliance to step in the war against Iran and use it as a leverage in easing Tehran's grip over Strait of Hormuz that has squeesed oil supply.​​ The strain in the alliance continues even after the last-moment "fragile ceasefire" was reached between US-Iran for two weeks as Europe largely keep itself beyong the ambit of the West Asia war.

title: Bhojshala dispute: Hindu outfit cites ASI report claiming temple preceded mosque
content: The Hindu Front for Justice informed the Madhya Pradesh High Court that ASI's scientific survey report supports their claim of a temple predating the mosque at the Bhojshala complex.  Advocate Vishnu Shankar Jain presented evidence, including inscriptions and idol remains, citing the ASI's findings. The court allowed highlighting relevant report portions amidst objections.

title: BJK Cup: India learn the cost of not closing things out
content: India suffered a 0-3 loss to Indonesia in the Billie Jean King Cup after a series of missed opportunities. Vaishnavi Adkar and the doubles pair of Ankita Raina and Rutuja Bhosale let winning chances slip, while Sahaja Yamalapalli struggled against a higher-ranked opponent. Coach Vishal Uppal said, “I think today was a day of missed chances,” urging players to learn, improve, and keep fighting despite fading qualification hopes.

title: Rs 590 crore IDFC First Bank scam: Haryana govt suspends 2 IAS officers
content: Haryana suspends two IAS officers, RK Singh and Pradeep Kumar, in connection with a Rs 500 crore IDFC First Bank scam. The probe has been transferred to the CBI. The scam allegedly involved siphoning off nearly Rs 590 crore of government funds through shell companies and bogus billing.

title: Shock 40-day blackout: China seals off skies twice the size of Taiwan without warning
content: China has imposed a 40-day ban on civil aviation over a vast airspace near Shanghai, sparking speculation about military activities. The extensive, unexplained restriction, covering over 73,000 sq km, is unusual in its scale and duration, with experts suggesting it's for military exercises. This move is seen as part of China's broader strategy to assert influence in the Indo-Pacific.

title: 'No intention of watching': Nakamura on Carlsen vs Hans documentary
content: Hikaru Nakamura said he has no interest in watching Netflix’s documentary on Magnus Carlsen vs Hans Niemann, citing lack of context and personal disinterest. While the film revisits their 2022 controversy, Niemann declares: “I’m gonna be a stone cold killer. I’m going to become the best player in the world.”

title: Sandeep Reddy Vanga slams Dhurandhar 2 propaganda claims, backs Aditya, Ranveer
content: Sandeep Reddy Vanga has lauded 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' as an outstanding film, defending it against accusations of propaganda. Vanga criticized those labeling truth as propaganda, stating that a significant effort is needed to counter the film's impact. He shared his thoughts after watching the movie with Prabhas.

title: Brothers of destruction! Jaiswal-Sooryavanshi eclipses 'Travishek' to set IPL record
content: When we apply at least 10-innings filter, only Sunil Narine and Phil Salt have scored at a faster rate than Yashasvi Jaiswal and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi among opening pairs in IPL history. ​​The duo have been in sensational touch this season and have fired on all cylinders in the Royals’ three wins in as many games.

title: 'Not good for Hinduism': SC flags risks of sect-based temple curbs
content: The Supreme Court expressed concern over sect-based temple restrictions, warning they could harm Hinduism and divide society. A nine-judge bench heard arguments on religious freedom versus state power to open temples, with judges questioning exclusions that might negatively impact the religion and its followers.

title: Umpiring blunder! Finn Allen dismissal sparks row in KKR vs LSG match
content: Umpiring faced backlash in the Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) vs Lucknow Super Giants (LSG) IPL 2026 match after Finn Allen’s controversial catch dismissal by Digvesh Rathi on Thursday. Fans questioned its validity, sparking debate and memes online. Despite the uproar, KKR steadied their innings, but the incident kept umpiring standards under scrutiny.

title: Iran after ceasefire with US: Holding ground in an uncertain pause
content: A fragile two-week ceasefire, brokered by Pakistan, has temporarily halted US-Israel strikes on Iran, shifting focus to fundamental changes and the truce's durability. While Iran has absorbed significant military pressure and its apparatus continues functioning, the conflict has inflicted heavy economic and civilian costs, impacting regional security.

title: '6 months left to live': Yuvraj on warning he got before cancer treatment
content: At that time, Yuvraj had just played a big role in India’s 2011 World Cup win, he was Player of the Tournament. During the tournament, he was dealing with fatigue, nausea and discomfort. The illness was not detected then, and he continued to play.

title: Sara Arjun to play Madhubala in Bhansali production, Jasmeet K Reen to direct
content: Excitement is building as Sara Arjun is announced to portray the beloved film star Madhubala in an upcoming cinematic venture directed by the talented Jasmeet K Reen and produced by the illustrious Sanjay Leela Bhansali. This project, now in its pre-production stage, seeks to capture the essence of Hindi cinema's illustrious past, chronicling the extraordinary life and struggles of Madhubala.

title: Quote of the Day by Elizabeth Bishop, 'One shouldn't get too involved with people who...'
content: Elizabeth Bishop was a renowned 20th-century poet. Her clear writing and sharp observations left a lasting mark. Bishop's life, marked by early loss and extensive travel, deeply influenced her work. She focused on detailed descriptions and imagery, letting emotion emerge through observation. Her poems explored themes of belonging and the human condition.

title: Trump Warns Iran Over Toll On Ships Transiting Strait Of Hormuz
content: US President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran against imposing a toll for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz, after Tehran agreed to reopen the crucial route as part of a two-week ceasefire.

title: Nitish Kumar To Take Oath As Rajya Sabha Member Today
content: Bihar Chief Minister and Janata Dal (United) chief Nitish Kumar will take oath as a member of the Rajya Sabha today.

title: Israeli PM Netanyahu's Corruption Trial To Resume On April 12
content: Benjamin Netanyahu, who has repeatedly denied any wrongdoing in the three court cases, is the first sitting Israeli prime minister to stand trial for corruption.

title: Meitei Groups Seek Action After Attack On BSF Soldier's House Kills 2 Children
content: The Meitei civil society organisations demanded that all Kuki insurgent groups be disarmed before any peace negotiations are started, and called the current dialogue process ineffective.

title: Putin Announces Ceasefire With Ukraine For Orthodox Easter Holidays
content: Russian President Vladimir Putin announced a ceasefire with Ukraine for the duration of the Orthodox Easter holidays, the Kremlin said Thursday, after Kyiv also proposed a pause in hostilities.

title: IMF To Cut Global Growth Forecast, War-Hit Nations To Get Up To $50 Billion
content: IMF managing director Kristalina Georgieva said that -- even in the fund's "most hopeful scenario" -- spiraling energy costs, infrastructure damage, supply disruptions and a loss of market confidence meant growth would be less than expected.

title: US-Israel-Iran War Live: Israeli Strikes Killed Over 300, Says Lebanon Ministry
content: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates:  US President Donald Trump agreed to a two-day ceasefire just hours before the deadline he had set for Iran to capitulate, warning that otherwise a "whole civilisation will die tonight."

title: Trump Considers Removing Some US Troops From Europe Amid NATO Strains
content: US President Donald Trump has discussed with advisers the option of removing some US troops from Europe, a senior White House official told Reuters on Thursday.

title: Region-Wide Ceasefire Would Hasten His Jailing: Iran Minister On Netanyahu
content: Netanyahu was indicted in 2019 on charges of bribery, fraud and breach of trust - all of which he denies. His trial, which started in 2020, could result in jail terms and has faced multiple delays due to his official commitments.

title: 2-Year-Old Boy Falls Into Borewell In Madhya Pradesh's Ujjain, Rescue On
content: The child, identified as Bhagirath, is the son of Praveen Devasi, a shepherd who had arrived in the area.

title: Plans For Talks With US Remain On Track: Iran Deputy Foreign Minister
content: Reflecting on the immediate lead-up to the current truce, the Deputy Foreign Minister described the volatility of the situation.

title: Madhya Pradesh's Uniform Civil Code Push May Face Tribal Hurdle
content: Enacting UCC in Madhya Pradesh isn't a novel idea but a revival of old efforts. However, this time, the intent appears sharper and complications deeper.

title: "We Are Not Some Piece Of Ice": Greenland Hits Out After Trump Insult
content: Donald Trump on Wednesday vented his frustration with NATO as relations reached a crisis point over the Iran war, stating that the military alliance was not around when needed.

title: 5 From J&K Die In Road Accident In Kuwait
content: Former Chief Minister Mehbooba Mufti has appealed to the Ministry of External Affairs to facilitate the repatriation of the bodies.

title: Max Verstappen's inner circle is unravelling -- and so are Red Bull's hopes of keeping him
content: The departure of Max Verstappen's longtime race engineer Gianpiero Lambiase will add fuel to the inferno that is building over the four-time world champion's immediate F1 future, writes ESPN's Nate Saunders.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man City eye move for Hertha's Eichhorn
content: Manchester City are looking to sign Hertha Berlin's teenage defensive midfielder Kennet Eichhorn. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Ex-IPS officer Ninama, former AAP leader join BJP ahead of Gujarat local polls
content: M.L. Ninama, who recently took voluntary retirement three months before his scheduled superannuation, joined the BJP at an event in Shamlaji in Aravalli district

title: From the margins to momentum: the BJP’s electoral journey in Tamil Nadu
content: The BJP initially capitalised on Hindutva politics in Kanniyakumari, winning its first Assembly seat in 1996; thereafter it tasted success only in alliance with the Dravidian majors; hopes to convert its rising vote share to more seats in 2026

title: Rajasthan ACB arrests retired IAS officer Subodh Agarwal in Jal Jeevan Mission scam
content: The Anti-Corruption Bureau’s investigation into the alleged JJM scam, which began in 2024, has led to the arrest of 10 accused, while three others are absconding

title: Over 4,600 in fray for Tamil Nadu Assembly polls
content: Karur has the highest number of contestants in a single constituency, with 85 candidates in the race; there were 47 candidates in Perambur, including TVK president C. Joseph Vijay

title: Record turnout in Puducherry, Assam; Kerala near all-time high
content: Incumbents express confidence after increased voter turnout; ‘crucial’ polls will provide a bigger mandate, says Kerala Chief Minister; Assam CM hails ‘historic’ turnout as many polling booths cross 95%

title: Double murder in Bihar, but BJP, JD(U) vying for CM seat: Tejashwi
content: My appeal is that in the game of musical chairs, the BJP-JD(U) government should not murder the rights, demands, aspirations, hopes, and dreams of lakhs of youth of Bihar, says RJD leader

title: ₹550-cr. bank ‘scam’: CBI registers FIR; Haryana govt. suspends 2 IAS officers
content: The matter was initially examined by the State government and referred to the State Vigilance and Anti-Corruption Bureau in February for investigation

title: From hiding to hope: Bastar and its surrendered Maoists
content: The CAPF camp drive, security grid expansion, wipeout of leadership, erasure of corridors, and other reasons have resulted in Maoists surrendering in Chhattisgarh’s Bastar. Vijaita Singh reports on how the Maoist insurgency has fallen over the past two years, especially since the killing of its top leader Basavaraju last year, followed by the death of nine central committee members in encounters.

title: The Simple living in Kurma Gramam village
content: Nestled amidst the scenic hills of Hiramandalam in Andhra Pradesh, Kurma Gramam is a tiny hamlet, spread across 60 acres and inhabited by 17 families that stands in contrast to modern lifestyles. Cut off from the contemporary living, the village functions without electricity, mobile phones, internet connectivity or even LPG services. Life here moves at a slower pace, deeply rooted in simplicity and spiritual discipline, writes Harish Gilai

title: ‘Where the relationship ends in a break-up, the man is in the lock-up,’ observes Karnataka High Court
content: The court made this observation in its interim order of staying a probe against a 34-year-old man and ordering his immediate release from prison

title: Byelections: Polling percentage drops, but voting passes off peacefully in Davangere South, Bagalkot
content: According to the preliminary data before reconciliation provided by the poll authorities, Bagalkot recorded a polling percentage of 68.73% and Davangere South recorded 68.55%

title: Anaicut: Predominantly tribal constituency long plagued by neglect of basic infrastructure
content: Civic amenities such as bitumen roads, water supply, electricity connection and government hospital still remain a distant dream for residents of many tribal hamlets in the hills

title: Summer scares: With the peaking of summer, marauding wild animals throw life out of gear in the eastern regions of Kollam
content: As summer progresses, the eastern forest fringes of Kollam become hotspots of human-wildlife conflict. The presence of herds of bison and elephants even near towns throws normal life into disarray. The crisis extends into the vast agricultural sectors of the region as well. Navamy Sudhish explores the reasons for the wildlife incursion and how effective are the preventive strategies deployed by the Forest department

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Three people cast their vote in Pachakkanam booth inside Periyar Tiger Reserve
content: The booth was specifically set up at the Pachakkanam Anganwadi to accommodate a total of six registered voters: five men and one woman

title: Reining in medicine prices despite war impact on pharma inputs: Official
content: Propylene remains the most critical input since it is used in Isopropyl Alcohol (IPA) and Isobutyl Benzene production, which are used in medicines such as Ibuprofen

title: Krishna Milk Union launches new Vijaya dairy products in Vijayawada
content: The initiative aims to provide healthy and tasty dairy products to consumers while adopting modern packaging standards to meet the market demand, says KMU chairman

title: Christian bodies urge A.P. govt. to restore peace in Akiveedu
content: Tension prevailed in Akiveedu after two groups clashed during Ram Navami celebrations at Pedda Peta on March 27

title: Assam sees record voter turnout of over 85.9%
content: Officials said voting was largely peaceful, despite reports of violence in a few constituencies, including Khowang and Tamulpur, and allegations of proxy voting at a booth in the Guwahati Central constituency

title: Kerala records turnout of 78.27% in high-stakes election
content: Among the districts, Kozhikode had the highest polling percentage at 81.32%, followed by Palakkad 80.56%, according to the latest updates on the EC’s ECINET app.

title: Reports on relocation of Tadepalli IOCL plant trigger anxiety among workers
content: Pointing out that the plant provides social and economic security to nearly 200 families, workers express livelihood concerns; company representative denies any such move

title: CWC meet to discuss women’s quota amendments, delimitation and West Asia
content: The Congress Working Committee will discuss the political and constitutional implications of the proposed changes, including the planned delimitation of parliamentary constituencies

title: What does the Jan Vishwas Bill do? | Explained
content: What does the Jan Vishwas Bill propose? Which offences are being decriminalised? Why remove jail terms for minor lapses? How does the Bill ensure proportionality? How will penalties be structured?

title: Karnataka Deputy Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar hits out at Vijay’s remarks, releases Congress manifesto
content: He terms the TVK president an ‘immature politician’ in response to the latter claiming that the ‘real Congress’ was with his party at a public meeting in Tirunelveli recently

title: Follow the rituals and practices of a temple or stay out, says Supreme Court
content: Petitioners say the 2018 verdict, which allowed women of all ages to enter Sabarimala, didn’t apply the sampradaya test

title: Organs from 35-year-old brain-dead woman in Kerala to save multiple lives
content: IT professional’s six organs, including her heart, liver, and kidneys, were harvested, with the heart destined for a 14-year-old girl in Malappuram.

title: Six-foot python survives after surgery in veterinary college in Tirunelveli
content: The six-foot snake, weighing around 4 kg, was brought for treatment by Moolakal forest ranger Balasubramanian with the assistance of the Karu Animal Rescue Unit Trust, Veeravanallur

title: Welfare schemes started by my government will endure beyond my lifetime: Stalin
content: DMK president hits out at former Chief Minister Edappadi K. Palaniswami, remarks that the latter has been unable to accept the progress achieved under the ‘Dravidian Model’ of governance

title: Two India-bound ships among a few transiting Hormuz Strait on Day 2 of ceasefire
content: Ship tracker websites show that Marivex, an oil tanker, is carrying oil from Bandar Abbas in Iran to New Mangalore Port; MSG, another oil tanker, is carrying cargo from UAE to India

title: Mandya railway station to be upgraded; additional railway station planned for Maddur
content: Being a key agricultural, commercial and tourism hub between Bengaluru and Mysuru, Kumaraswamy says Mandya requires a modern railway station

title: Karnataka records ‘historic’ 86.48% pass percentage for freshers in II PUC
content: Of the 6,48,853 students who registered, a total of 5,46,698 students passed the exam across Science, Commerce and Arts streams.

title: NIA may probe the killing of two Meitei children in Manipur; attackers unidentified
content: Protests and shutdown continue in Manipur capital and other valley areas; curfew and Internet curbs to remain; CM to request Centre to stop withdrawing security personnel from the State

title: High enthusiasm, long queues mark polling as Puducherry shatters record
content: There were no major complaints pertaining to polling process; however, there were allegations of voter inducement and reports of minor scuffles from two constituencies during the early hours of polling.

title: 61 Railway stations across Karnataka taken up for redevelopment: V. Somanna
content: The focus of redevelopment will be on providing modern infrastructure, enhanced passenger amenities, and seamless multimodal integration

title: Orissa HC quashes summons against Mukesh Ambani
content: The court penalises a lawyer for repeatedly filing criminal complaints during his 23-year legal battle from a lower court to the Supreme Court over a defective mobile phone worth ₹501

title: Way-Too-Early Top 25: Ranking the best teams for next season, now
content: the 2026-27 college basketball season is expected to take place in 2026 . we're already rolling right into the "offseason," which mostly involves rampant roster changes for the next six weeks . in the past, we've had pretty hard-and-fast house rules regarding the Way-Too-Early Top 25 .

title: Payment lags can help curb digital fraud: RBI
content: an RBI discussion paper proposes a short delay, or "lag" for high-value transfers above Rs 10,000 . this gives customers time to rethink a transaction and cancel it if they suspect fraud . customers may be allowed to whitelist trusted payees so genuine payments are not delayed .

title: Meet the newest source for steals in Chicago
content: the fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . the six-game slate kicks off at 12:10 p.m. ET with the Miami Marlins hosting the Cincinnati Reds .

title: Roman Reigns' Top 10 WrestleMania main events: Which match finished No. 1?
content: Roman Reigns will challenge CM Punk at WrestleMania 42 Night 2 on April 18 at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas for the world heavyweight championship in his 11th main event . he defeated Brock Lesnar at the "Winner Take All" main event between lesnar and thera .

title: Coaches, GMs weigh in on SEC's top newcomers
content: new faces will be announced all over the SEC in 2026 . coaches, general managers and personnel staffers selected one newcomer for each SEC team with a path to immediate contribution . RB Ezavier and RB ezavier are among the players to add to the roster .

title: Stick or sack? Slot's Liverpool future dominates UCL talking points
content: the UEFA Champions League quarterfinals kicked off this week . arsenal beat Sporting CP 1-0 thanks to an injury-time goal . real madrid and bayern munich traded punches and shots for 90 minutes .

title: Women's transfer rankings for 2026-27 season
content: the women's college basketball transfer portal opened Monday with a tidal wave of activity . more than 1,300 players are looking for new homes . the portal closes April 20 but players' decisions for their next school can still come after that .

title: Pochettino's to-do list: What the USMNT must figure out before World Cup
content: Mauricio Pochettino will have a pre-World Cup camp to get his side ready for competition . he'll have to lock in his choices on which players will join him in the world cup cauldron . the men's national team are ranked outside the top 20 contenders to win the 2026 world cup .

title: Masters tiers: Ranking all 91 players in the field
content: for the first time in his career, Rory McIlroy will drive down Magnolia Lane this week as a Masters champion . a year ago, he made a 4-foot birdie putt on the 18th hole to defeat england's Justin Rose on the first hole of a sudden-death playoff . with his long-awaited Masters victory, Mcilroy became only the sixth golfer to complete the career Grand Slam .

title: Back to the future: Repicking the 2016 NHL draft
